data.title: Senate delays crypto bill markup after opposition from Coinbase; Tim Scott emphasizes good faith collaboration, White House Crypto Czar sees passage closer than ever. Stakeholders aiming to establish consensus before proceeding.
data.description: Senate Banking Committee Chair Sen. Tim Scott (R-S.C.) announced a delay in the markup of cryptocurrency market structure legislation due to industry opposition. The committee is taking a "brief pause" to establish consensus before moving forward. Senator Scott stated that all stakeholders are working in good faith. David Sacks, the White House Crypto Czar, expressed that the legislation's passage is near and encouraged the industry to address any existing differences during this pause. This delay reflects months of collaboration among industry leaders, financial sectors, and bipartisan colleagues. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ethereum aims for $3,500 amidst consolidation, short-term target $3,450-$3,500, bullish breakout at $3,457, critical support $3,261.
data.description: Summary of ETH Price Predictions:In the short term (1 week), Ethereum is expected to range between $3,450 and $3,500. Looking ahead to the medium term (1 month), forecasts suggest the price could fall within the $3,200 to $3,600 range. For a bullish breakout, investors are eyeing a critical level of $3,457. Conversely, the support level crucial for price stability is projected at $3,261. Analysts remain watchful of these key levels for potential market movements.

data.title: NBPE announces transaction in own shares with restrictions in multiple countries including Australia, Canada, Italy, Denmark, Japan, & the United States.
data.description: The details provided in this document are restricted from being released, published, or distributed in Australia, Canada, Italy, Denmark, Japan, the United States, or to any citizens of these countries.

data.title: VAALCO Energy, Inc. reports positive operational & financial update for 2025, with success in Gabon & Egypt drilling. Cash at bank increased by December 31, 2025.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Houston, VAALCO Energy, Inc. (NYSE: EGY, LSE: EGY) shared an update on their operations and finances. In the year 2025, the company reported production and sales volumes. They also announced successful drilling activities in Gabon and Egypt. Additionally, there was a positive accounts receivables update. As of December 31, 2025, VAALCO Energy, Inc. noted an increase in cash reserves held by the company.

data.title: Cargill debuts 1st green methanol dual-fuel vessel Brave Pioneer to advance maritime decarbonisation.
data.description: Cargill revealed the launch of Brave Pioneer, the initial of five green methanol dual-fuel dry bulk ships chartered by the company, from Geneva. Brave Pioneer signifies a crucial step in Cargill's wider decarbonization initiatives, emphasizing innovation, experimentation, and collaboration with customers and partners to enhance sustainable solutions. Constructed by Tsuneishi Shipbuilding Co., Ltd., this vessel stands as a testament to Cargill's commitment to investing in eco-friendly technology and exploring future-ready options for Cargill and the maritime sector.

data.title: Elistair chosen for French "Pendragon" defense project by Tonner Drones, combining tethered drones & AI-driven UGV for military operations.
data.description: Elistair has been chosen to participate in the French defense project "Pendragon" that focuses on Tonner Drones. The project aims to integrate tethered drones and AI-powered Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGVs) for strategic military tasks. This collaboration seeks to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of military operations by utilizing a combination of drones and advanced technology.

data.title: Castrol debuts 'Drive Me To The Moon' documentary with Lunar Outpost at worldwide premiere in Space Center Houston.
data.description: Castrol recently debuted a new documentary called Drive Me to the Moon in partnership with Lunar Outpost. The worldwide premiere took place at Space Center Houston on January 15, 2026. This 'edutainment' film offers a captivating look into space exploration and technology. Collaborating with Lunar Outpost, based in Colorado, Castrol showcases the next frontier in lunar travel.

data.title: Keepit announces consolidated global channel team led by Jan Ursi to accelerate growth through partners, aiming to become the most partner-friendly organization in the world. Three regional leaders to support with coverage in Southern Europe, Northern Europe.
data.description: Copenhagen, Denmark - Keepit, a leading cloud-native data protection and recovery provider, revealed a restructured global channel organization aimed at boosting growth through partnerships and solidifying its position as a highly collaborative company. Headed by Jan Ursi, the Global Vice President of Channels, the enhanced channel team comprises regional leaders overseeing Southern Europe, Northern Europe, and more for a comprehensive approach. By ramping up partner support, Keepit aims to excel as the most partner-centric entity on a global scale, focusing on fostering mutually beneficial relationships to drive success.

data.title: AWS launches European Sovereign Cloud in EU, separate from other regions, providing strong technical controls.
data.description: In Potsdam, Germany, Amazon Web Services (AWS) revealed the launch of the AWS European Sovereign Cloud, an exclusive cloud for Europe situated entirely in the EU and isolated from other AWS Regions. This new offering provides a fully operational sovereign cloud with robust technical controls, sovereign guarantees, and legal safeguards. The AWS European Sovereign Cloud is now available as a separate entity in the EU, ensuring data protection and compliance.

data.title: Russian lawmaker aims to grant limited crypto access to retail investors, plans to deregulate market with new bill.
data.description: A prominent Russian official revealed intentions for deregulating the cryptocurrency market for retail use, stating that digital assets are expected to become widespread in the country. It was announced that a bill is in the works to facilitate this shift in regulation.

data.title: Pakistan partners with Trump-affiliated World Liberty Financial to explore stablecoin payments, aims to use dollar stablecoins for cross-border transactions. Agreement signed with Ministry of Finance, emphasizing innovation in digital finance. CEO Zach Witkoff meets with Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif.
data.description: Pakistan's government announced a partnership with World Liberty Financial (CRYPTO: WLFI), a decentralized platform linked to President Donald Trump's family, to investigate the use of stablecoins for cross-border transactions. The Pakistan Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority shared that World Liberty Financial has signed a Memorandum of Understanding with the Ministry of Finance to foster innovation in digital finance. The agreement focuses on exploring the benefits of stablecoins in cross-border transactions. Zach Witkoff, World Liberty Financial's co-founder and CEO, held discussions with Pakistan's leadership, including Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, during his visit to the country. Today, the MoU was officially signed, marking a significant step in this collaboration.
